ModMetaData.name: VRE Saurid (HSK/CE Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Neronix17 — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction (CE patches adapted from Pacas Patches Compilation)
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched standalone version of Vanilla Races Expanded — Saurid, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VRE Saurid mod content with HSK conventions and Combat Extended patches baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Saurid alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
Bundled CE patches (adapted from Pacas Patches Compilation, then re-tuned for HSK CE armor scale): - VRESaurids_ScaleSkin gene — natural scale armor rescaled to HSK CE values (Sharp 4 / Blunt 4, between bare skin and light flak; Pacas's vanilla CE values of 1.0/1.0 were functionally useless under HSK CE math) - VRESaurids_SauridClaws hediff — claws verb converted to CombatExtended.ToolCE with proper Sharp/Blunt armor penetration
Saurid is a content-light race (no recipes, no buildings, no costLists, no weapons, no apparel). All HSK material conventions are preserved by default since there's nothing to convert.
Original mod by Oskar Potocki and Neronix17. CE patch baseline by Pacas. HSK/CE conversion + bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC.
